name: Brute Force Login Attempt
description: Detection of multiple failed login attempts from the same source IP.
alert_description: Detected {count} failed login attempts from source IP {group_by} within 5 minutes.

name: Multiple Account Lockouts
description: Detection of multiple account lockouts in a short period.
alert_description: {count} account lockouts detected for user {group_by} within 10 minutes.

name: Admin Login From New IP
description: Detection of administrative login from an unusual source.
alert_description: An administrative login was successful from IP {group_by}.

name: Port Scan Detection
description: Detection of rapid connection attempts to multiple destinations.
alert_description: {count} network connections from {group_by} detected within 60 seconds.

name: Suspicious PowerShell Execution
description: Detection of a PowerShell process being spawned with suspicious parameters.
alert_description: A suspicious PowerShell process was executed on host {group_by}.

name: Encoded PowerShell Command
description: Detection of Base64 encoded PowerShell commands.
alert_description: User {group_by} executed an encoded PowerShell command.

name: Suspicious Process Spawn
description: Detection of unusual child processes from common applications.
alert_description: An unusual child process was detected on host {group_by}.

name: New Admin Account Created
description: Detection of local administrator group modifications.
alert_description: A new administrative user account was created on host {group_by}.

name: Privilege Escalation Attempt
description: Detection of common privilege escalation techniques.
alert_description: User {group_by} attempted a privilege escalation operation.

name: Suspicious Outbound Connection
description: Detection of outbound traffic to known malicious indicators.
alert_description: An outbound connection to a suspicious IP {group_by} was detected.

name: Malware Detection Event
description: Alert triggered by endpoint security malware detection.
alert_description: Active malware was detected and blocked on host {group_by}.

name: Firewall Block Flood
description: Massive amount of firewall blocks from a single source.
alert_description: Detected {count} firewall deny events from IP {group_by} in 60 seconds.

name: Multiple Authentication Failures
description: Detection of multiple failed logins across different accounts from one IP.
alert_description: Source IP {group_by} failed {count} logins across multiple accounts.

name: Login From Suspicious Country
description: Detection of successful login from a high-risk geographic location.
alert_description: User {group_by} logged in from a suspicious geographic location.

name: Multiple Password Resets
description: Detection of frequent password reset requests.
alert_description: User {group_by} requested {count} password resets in 30 minutes.

name: Sensitive File Access
description: Detection of access to restricted configuration or credential files.
alert_description: {count} access attempts to sensitive file {group_by} detected.

name: Log Erasure Detected
description: Detection of event logs being cleared.
alert_description: System event logs were cleared on host {group_by}.

name: Suspicious Scheduled Task
description: Detection of a new scheduled task used for persistence.
alert_description: A new scheduled task was created on host {group_by}.

name: Rare Process Execution
description: Detection of a process that has never been seen in the environment.
alert_description: The process {group_by} was executed for the first time in this workspace.

name: Abnormal Data Egress
description: Large volume of data sent to external destination.
alert_description: Detected a high volume of data egress from source {group_by}.
